name: Weibo
description: Read-only access to the configured user's Weibo timeline.

appKey.description: Weibo Open Platform AppKey (aka client_id). Required by some endpoints as the 'source' parameter.

accessToken.description: Weibo OAuth access_token with permission to read the user's timeline.

uid.description: Weibo user UID. Provide either uid or screenName.

screenName.description: Weibo user screen name. Provide either uid or screenName.

baseUrl.description: Optional Weibo API base URL. Defaults to https://api.weibo.com.
